news.title: Tesla Austin Unsupervised Robotaxi Fleet Reaches 10 Model Ys
news.summary: Tesla's Austin Robotaxi fleet achieved a record of 10 unsupervised Model Y vehicles operating driverless.
news.impact_reason: Mildly positive milestone confirming incremental growth in Austin's unsupervised fleet size, supporting steady scaling momentum in the primary hub.

news.title: Tesla Deploys Four Unsupervised Robotaxis in Dallas and Houston Post-Launch
news.summary: Crowdsourced Robotaxi Tracker data indicates Tesla increased unsupervised vehicles to two each in Dallas and Houston shortly after launch, totaling four, compared to 13 active unsupervised in Austin over the last 30 days.
news.impact_reason: Mildly positive as it demonstrates initial fleet buildup in new geofences, signaling commitment to scaling unsupervised operations outside Austin.

news.title: Tesla Expands Unsupervised Robotaxi to Dallas and Houston
news.summary: Tesla launched unsupervised Robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston, Texas, with initial geofence areas defined and video evidence showing no safety drivers. This triples Tesla's active unsupervised Robotaxi hubs in Texas, building on ongoing operations in Austin.
news.impact_reason: Major positive catalyst as expanding to two additional Texas cities with favorable regulations directly accelerates overall unsupervised fleet scaling velocity beyond Austin by tripling the state's operational footprint in weeks.

news.title: Tesla Discloses 14 Crashes Involving Austin Robotaxis Since Launch
news.summary: In a February filing, Tesla reported 14 crashes involving its Austin robotaxis since service launch.
news.impact_reason: Mildly negative as disclosed incidents could draw regulatory scrutiny or public concern, potentially slowing unsupervised scaling velocity in Austin.
